eng-persist-user-settings.description: Old attempt to persist settings - PR #36 was closed by maintainer, superseded by fix-persist-brightness-colortemp-2026-06-24

eng-global-json-2026-06-21.description: Add global.json to pin .NET SDK to 10.0.x (Closes #62)

improve-cache-json-options-2026-06-21.description: Cache JsonSerializerOptions as static readonly fields

fix-hotkey-feedback.description: Fix: notify user when global hotkey registration fails

test-appsettings-2026-06-22.description: Add AppSettings unit test project (xUnit, 12 tests)

perf-mouse-hook-2026-06-22.description: Perf: reduce GC pressure from WH_MOUSE_LL hook

eng-ci-pr-check-2026-06-23.description: Add CI build check on push/PR to master

improve-color-temp-hotkeys-2026-06-23.description: Add global hotkeys Ctrl+Shift+Left/Right for colour temperature adjustment

fix-all-monitors-color-temp-2026-06-24.description: Fix: apply current colour temperature when enabling all-monitors mode

improve-glow-color-temp-2026-06-24.description: Improve: tint glow shadow to match colour temperature

fix-persist-brightness-colortemp-2026-06.description: Fix: persist brightness and colour temperature across restarts - adds AppSettings.Brightness and AppSettings.ColorTemperature, loads and applies on startup, saves on change

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs (LerpColor, ApplyDisplayAffinity) as not_planned. Closed atomic-settings-save PR as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit. PR #36 (persist settings) was also closed - new attempt (fix-persist-brightness-colortemp-2026-06-24) is more focused: only brightness and color temp, not on/off state.
notes: 2026-06-24 run 2: Task2 - no new user issues to comment on (only #24, already commented, no new activity). Task3 - fix persist brightness/color temp across restarts (PR created). Monthly summary #74 updated. Note: PR #36 (old persist-settings attempt) is closed. The 2 filtered PRs visible in GitHub are #68 and #26; #26 is old Copilot winget PR, #68 is unknown (likely one of the recent color-temp-related PRs from 06-23 or 06-24 run 1).
